caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSSES TALK" printed in gold lettering sits at a table in a studio setting. He is speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. To his right sits a black mug with red and blue text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD." The background features white walls with a logo consisting of five gold stars and the text "URBAN HUSTLE" repeated. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his facial expressions, though his overall posture remains consistent. The camera angle is a medium close-up, and the lighting is bright and even, focusing on the man as he engages in a conversation.
